problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Aerogel. Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
